name: protonmail-mcp
description: Proton Mail MCP server (13 tools via Bridge IMAP/SMTP) + email triage skill for Claude Code.

PROTON_BRIDGE_USER.title: Proton address (Bridge user)
PROTON_BRIDGE_USER.description: Your Proton Mail address used to authenticate against Proton Bridge (IMAP/SMTP). Example: you@proton.me

PROTON_BRIDGE_PASS.title: Bridge app-password
PROTON_BRIDGE_PASS.description: Bridge-generated app password (NOT your Proton account password). Obtain it with `protonmail-bridge-core --cli` then `info`. Stored as a secret — never your real account password.

PROTON_MAIL_FROM.title: From address (optional)
PROTON_MAIL_FROM.description: Address used in the From header when sending. Defaults to PROTON_BRIDGE_USER if left empty.

PROTON_BRIDGE_HOST.title: Bridge host
PROTON_BRIDGE_HOST.description: Host where Proton Bridge listens. Usually the loopback address.

PROTON_BRIDGE_IMAP_PORT.title: Bridge IMAP port
PROTON_BRIDGE_IMAP_PORT.description: Local IMAP port exposed by Proton Bridge.

PROTON_BRIDGE_SMTP_PORT.title: Bridge SMTP port
PROTON_BRIDGE_SMTP_PORT.description: Local SMTP port exposed by Proton Bridge.

PROTON_BRIDGE_TLS_INSECURE.title: Allow Bridge self-signed TLS
PROTON_BRIDGE_TLS_INSECURE.description: Set to true to accept Proton Bridge's self-signed certificate on the loopback connection.
